parsed_profile.arc_function: Diplomatic breakdown analysis from analytical framework through August 1939 crisis to war declaration and phony war paradox, establishing contingency arguments through documentary evidence and multi-perspective witnessing
parsed_profile.dominant_engine: Documentary evidence accumulation with analytical counterfactual framework
parsed_profile.pov_distance: Scholarly third-person omniscient with direct reader address; shifts to first-person through embedded diary excerpts; occasional diary reveals private emotional states
parsed_profile.sentence_rhythm: Variable density mixing short declarative military orders with longer analytical sentences building atmospheric context
parsed_profile.paragraphing: Extended continuous prose with thematic breaks; dense information paragraphs punctuated by single-sentence dramatic emphasis
parsed_profile.dialogue_method: Reported speech reconstructed from historical records; occasional quoted phrases; minimal direct dialogue in favor of documented statements
parsed_profile.description_method: Concrete specificity over abstraction—named entities, exact times, individual fates rather than categorical descriptions; brief atmospheric sketches rather than extended scene-setting
parsed_profile.exposition_method: Thesis-statement-driven with scholarly context; information embedded in chronological narration rather than retrospective summary; citations serve as evidence trails
parsed_profile.hook_delivery: Documentary appendices precede analytical text; chapters end with personal details or unresolved tensions; supplementary material catalogs document references
parsed_profile.transition_method: Time stamps and location changes mark shifts between capitals and nations; bracket markers signal segment transitions from narrative to apparatus

reader_promise: Rigorous examination of WWII's non-inevitability through documentary evidence, revealing how institutional weaknesses and individual choices created contingent outcomes across the 1939 diplomatic crisis and phony war period
core_engine: Documentary evidence accumulation with analytical counterfactual framework establishing contingency thesis against historical determinism
state_variables: Analytical framework established for non-inevitability argument
Diplomatic crisis reaches turning point as Anglo-Polish treaty forces cancellation
War declared with paradoxical calm and minimal military engagement
Phony war documented through multi-national diary polyphony and official contradictions
Scholarly apparatus and primary directives appended as evidentiary payoff
reader_rewards: Understanding of book's core argument against historical inevitability
Framework for analyzing decision-makers' choices in final pre-war days
Recognition that institutional weaknesses and individual choices created contingent outcomes
Evidentiary foundation from appended primary source documents
Multi-national emotional polyphony through diary integration
Understanding of paradox between declared war and actual inactivity
reusable_mechanisms: Counterfactual reasoning against determinism establishing contingency thesis
Thesis-first organization with evidence to follow pattern
Framing chapter via appended documents as evidentiary foundation
Decade-reflective temporal positioning establishing contemporary relevance
Sequential diplomatic arrivals creating cascading tension
Last-moment cancellation/rescinding of planned action at dramatic threshold
Divided alliance revealing partner self-interest over commitment
Treaty anatomy showing public terms versus secret protocols
Personal diary integration conveying private reactions and emotions
Contrast perspective displaying different moods across capitals simultaneously
Cascading information where each diplomatic message alters subsequent calculations
Multiple diary excerpts from different nations/classes creating emotional polyphony
Specific trivial detail grounding larger historical shifts
Contrast between official policy documents and private sentiment
Documentary evidence (telegrams, orders, directives) as narrative devices
Paradox construction: declared state with minimal actual engagement
Appended authentic primary documents as evidentiary payoff
Graduated response planning balancing multiple fronts
non_reusable_specifics: World War II as subject matter
Specific thesis about institutional and participant dialogue in causation
Document title references (War Plan White, First Operational Order)
risk_patterns: Non-fiction content lacks narrative protagonist for reader identification
Analytical apparatus interrupts story flow if not clearly framed
Multiple named historical figures increase cognitive load
Documentary density may fatigue readers expecting narrative conventions
Absence of combat action may underwhelm readers expecting war narrative
Scholarly citation may read as academic rather than engaging prose
Schema designed for narrative fiction extraction with limited applicability
Multiple chapter cards failed LLM parsing requiring fallback
Supplementary chapter is placeholder material with minimal content
Low confidence due to non-applicable source type and parsing failures
